title: Acianthera exdrasii
taxonomy: Acianthera exdrasii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. Specifically, it belongs to the genus Acianthera, which is a group of orchids native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Acianthera exdrasii is further classified as a member of the tribe Epidendreae, which includes many species of orchids. Within the tribe, Acianthera exdrasii is placed in the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, a group of orchids characterized by their unique flowers and growth habits. The exact classification of Acianthera exdrasii is subject to ongoing research and revision.
